messages.body: Hello Willa! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a pleasu…
Hello Willa,  Still awaiting your response!

Subject: Let’s Catch Up, Willa! 🚀\n\nBody: Hey Willa, Hope you're doing great! I’ve been trying to reach you via phone and the Zoca app! Thought I’d pop into your inbox just in case I missed you there too. Would love…
Hey Willa,  I called your number and someone at the salon told you you’re not in.   Can you please text me back once you see this?

Hello Willa,  How are you doing?   Been trying to chase you for a while now hope everything is okay at your end.   I tried calling you, but again, no luck.  We can chat here if you are busy for a call, just wanted to und…

Subject: Trying to connect with you - ZOCA\n\nBody: Hi Willa, I hope you’re doing well! I tried calling you, however, it went to voicemail. I also did not hear back from you over the Zoca app chat so thought I'll jus…

Hello Willa,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I tried calling you, but went to voicemail again.  I’d love to hop on a call with you to understand what’s happening at your end. Please text me here once you’re available for a c…
Hello Willa,  I hope you’re doing well :)  I tried calling you, however, couldn’t reach you.   Just checking in to see how things are going at your end! :)

Thank you for calling, hello. Hi, is this Willa? No. Is Willa available to talk? This is Monisha calling from Zoka. No. Is there any other number where I can give her a call? No. All right, thank you so much.
